overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a vehicle driving on an elevated highway through a dense futuristic metropolis with towering neon-lit skyscrapers and digital billboards. The drive transitions from an enclosed urban canyon to an open waterfront view revealing an industrial harbor, showcasing the game's cyberpunk aesthetic and high-fidelity graphics.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a vehicle driving on an elevated highway beneath a distinctive green overpass structure. The road is flanked by towering cyberpunk skyscrapers on both sides, creating a semi-enclosed urban canyon. Digital billboards line the left side of the highway, changing from 'DOWNTOWN' to 'CITY CENTER' and then to 'CONBATAK' advertisements as the vehicle progresses. Sparse traffic moves ahead on the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban highway between dense skyscrapers with neon advertising

events.description: vehicle changes lanes to the right, overtaking a slower vehicle

agents.ego_description: weaving through light traffic while maintaining high speed along the elevated highway

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving in the right lane, eventually overtaken

entered.detail: large yellow billboard featuring a cartoon character advertisement
red and white corporate advertisement billboard

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the elevated highway, the vehicle drives through a canyon of cyberpunk skyscrapers with direct sunlight illuminating the glass facades. Various digital billboards flash by on the left side, including a prominent yellow character advertisement. The vehicle maneuvers through sparse traffic, changing lanes to overtake a yellow taxi. The green overpass structure and monorail tracks remain overhead throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront elevated highway with industrial harbor view

events.description: highway curves right revealing expansive body of water and industrial harbor district on the right side

agents.ego_description: driving along the curved waterfront highway with the industrial harbor visible on the right

entered.detail: expansive bay or ocean water reflecting sunlight, visible beyond the highway barrier
distant industrial structures, cranes, and dock facilities across the water

segments.scene_description: The highway curves to reveal a dramatic waterfront vista, with the right side opening up to a vast body of water and a distant industrial harbor district. The dense skyscrapers that previously lined the right side give way to the open water view, while the left side continues to feature the massive cyberpunk building facades now closer to the roadway. The vehicle continues driving along this scenic elevated route as the urban landscape transitions to waterfront industrial views.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along an elevated highway that transforms from a claustrophobic urban canyon into an expansive waterfront vista. It begins beneath a green overpass, moving through a dense corridor of towering skyscrapers where digital billboards cycle through advertisements for Downtown and Combatak. As the vehicle maneuvers through sparse traffic and overtakes a yellow taxi, the lighting shifts to direct sunlight reflecting off the glass facades of the surrounding buildings. The scene then opens up as the highway curves, causing the skyscrapers on the right to give way to a vast body of water and a distant industrial harbor. Finally, the camera continues along the scenic route, contrasting the massive building facades on the left with the wide, open horizon of the harbor district.
